acceptance_criteria: Updating display_name via Ivory reflects immediately in GET /api/v1/accounts/verify_credentials; bio markdown renders to HTML correctly; locked flag updates is_locked; fields_attributes with up to 4 items stored in fields_json; empty fields_attributes clears all fields
description: Implement the account profile update endpoint. Accepts: display_name, note (bio markdown), locked, bot, discoverable, fields_attributes[] (key/value metadata pairs). Renders bio from markdown to bio_html and stores both. Updates the local accounts row. Does not require an Update Actor activity — that is handled separately.
design: fields_json stored as JSON array of {name, value, verified_at} objects. bio rendered with pulldown-cmark + ammonia. Emit Update Actor activity to followers after profile change (reuse outbound actor update delivery). Return full updated Account object.
title: PATCH /api/v1/accounts/update_credentials
